metadata.title: Bereishis Starter Translation Reviews
metadata.notes: Local human-review records for context-sensitive translation choices. No live runtime authority dependency.

reviews.notes: Context English needs the article even though the Hebrew form is construct-like.
Usually untranslated in smooth English.
Paired with וָבֹהוּ as an idiomatic description of primordial disorder.
Context is best handled together with תֹהוּ.
In this phrase, English context is surface rather than face.
English context supplies the auxiliary from the clause.
Jussive force is smoother as let there be.
Vav-consecutive narrative form is contextual past.
